history.reasoning: Calculated the arithmetic mean by summing the values: 312.4 + 298.7 + 415.2 + 389.6 + 301.1 = 1717.0, then dividing by 5 to get 343.40. For sample standard deviation, calculated each value minus the mean, squared the differences, summed them to 12038.06, divided by N-1=4 to get variance 3009.515, then took the square root to get approximately 54.86.
